MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Kun H. Louie is present.
Attorney Warren T. Woo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Condon present.
Attorney Dave Marcolini representing the defendant through limited scope.

The parties meet and confer.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
